entry.title: New: RES24-294 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF ONE (1) HIGH-BACK TRADITIONAL BENCH, PREPARATION OF THE GROUNDS. AND A BRONZE PLAQUE WITH AN INSCRIPTION TO READ, "DONATED BY THE FAMILY OF VICTORIA 'CISSY' CARVALHO YUEN," VALUED AT $2,594.67, TO THE CITY FROM ALINE FRANKLIN TO BE INSTALLED AT PUʻULOA BEACH PARK.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
